text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The one who brings home the glory today shall be
that most first-rate of Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Precisely! As expected of my trainer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm off to the red carpet that awaits me—the
path of a shining King!
